title: 其實有冇人用Data Science + AI + Machine Learning 黎炒股 ？

replies.msg:
屌
唔想諗
寫個apps 出黎等部電腦自己分析 自己慢慢炒啦

p.s. 唔識寫

用下腦啦


識都收埋用

quote.msg:
用下腦啦


識都收埋用

replies.msg:
可能有d 搵夠了
想益下大家搵多d

上github search 都一堆pure price feeding 既machine learning model
大部分都大同小異
都係用1/3/5 mins 個價做data feeding
再predict t+1 個價

it is not working.

quote.msg:

大部分都大同小異
都係用1/3/5 mins 個價做data feeding
再predict t+1 個價

上github search 都一堆pure price feeding 既machine learning model

replies.msg:
我會話呢個方法唔work
即係用pure price is not a good way
你做forward feeding 其中一個好緊要既assumption 係markov process
i.e. action A will always lead to result B
即係correlation between Observation_t-1 in State_t must come up with Observation_t
but it is a must in stock price

by many assumption, stock price is oscillating in random moving (brownian motion), and forming a geometric normal distribution
就咁係呢個角度
已經講左比你聽2樣野
即係markov process 同stock price movement 係contradict

you just cannot do pure price forward feeding.

上github search 都一堆pure price feeding 既machine learning model
大部分都大同小異
都係用1/3/5 mins 個價做data feeding
再predict t+1 個價

it is not working.
Yes. 研究過唔準
我會話呢個方法唔work
即係用pure price is not a good way
你做forward feeding 其中一個好緊要既assumption 係markov process
i.e. action A will always lead to result B
即係correlation between Observation_t-1 in State_t must come up with Observation_t
but it is not a must in stock price

by many assumptions, stock price is oscillating in random movement(brownian motion), and forming a geometric normal distribution
就咁係呢個角度
已經講左比你聽2樣野
即係markov process 同stock price movement 係contradict

you just cannot do pure price forward feeding.
股票好多因素唔係完全靠歷史資料分析到。如果你個本唔夠買起成個行業的股等於冇用
只分析1,2 隻。一定蝕到你pk.

我會用bigdata 做filter. 但唔會零人手買股。 除非你有ibank 咁多本。
比你參考下
http://bigstockdata.com

你都係自己畫圖算啦
砌一個work既model你知唔知要駛幾多錢
人地ibank成隊做research
加stat同programming既expert
你data又冇相關知識又冇
你唔係諗住會有人送個俾你掛
